rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in component implementation annexes for implementation-level signal routing contracts.
Use assign statements in implementation scope only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed within annex agree blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings.
Output dependency guarantees must relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks follow the syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Assign statements in implementation scope must reference existing output features.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not use range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean data ports without scalar representation.
